title: CatBoost Ordered CTR Ensemble
summary: Current best AutoGluon run uses LightGBM/XGBoost; CatBoost is purpose-built for categorical variables and ordered target statistics that reduce prediction shift/leakage.
rationale: Current best AutoGluon run uses LightGBM/XGBoost; CatBoost is purpose-built for categorical variables and ordered target statistics that reduce prediction shift/leakage. This dataset has important categorical interactions: driver, race, compound, year, stint, and pit count.
implementation_hint: Train a separate CatBoostClassifier with categorical columns plus explicit interaction strings such as Race_Compound, Driver_Race, Year_Race, Compound_Stint, Driver_Compound. Use Logloss with eval_metric=AUC, class_weights or scale_pos_weight if positives are rare, and blend its rank-normalized predictions with the best GBM/XGB model.
expected_effect: May improve ranking on sparse categorical strategy patterns that tree models with basic category handling underuse.
risk: CatBoost can overfit high-cardinality interactions if validation is random; use grouped/OOF validation and early stopping.
